summary: Iteration 161 bug fixes verified: All critical Stripe payment bugs fixed. BL Coins quantity>1 for Ultimate tier works (API returns cs_live_* URLs for quantity=2,3). Stripe Connect onboarding works. Subscription checkout for all tiers (bronze/silver/gold/diamond) returns checkout_url successfully. UI shows founding members 50% off text and strikethrough standard prices on both Wallet and Subscriptions pages. Support email changed to virtual@blendlink.net.

minor.issue: Returns dictionary format not list - test script issue, not API bug

bl_coins_starter_quantity_1.details: POST /api/payments/stripe/bl-coins/checkout - starter tier quantity=1 returns cs_live_* URL

bl_coins_ultimate_quantity_2.details: POST /api/payments/stripe/bl-coins/checkout - ultimate tier quantity=2 ($59.98, 2M coins) returns cs_live_* URL - BUG FIXED

bl_coins_ultimate_quantity_3.details: POST /api/payments/stripe/bl-coins/checkout - ultimate tier quantity=3 ($89.97, 3M coins) works

bl_coins_price_mismatch_rejected.details: Price validation rejects mismatched amounts (security check working)

stripe_connect_onboard.details: POST /api/payments/stripe/connect/onboard returns valid Stripe Connect URL

subscriptions_page_founding_members.details: Founding members 50% off text found: 'Founding members who join during the pre-launch/launch period will have their subscription rate locked at 50% off the standard price for as long as they remain active members. Available for a Limited Time Only!'

subscriptions_page_strikethrough_prices.details: Strikethrough prices found: Bronze $4.99/mo (struck $9.99), Silver $9.99/mo (struck $19.99), Gold $14.99/mo (struck $29.99), Diamond $29.99/mo (struck $59.99)

subscriptions_page_support_email.details: Support email changed to virtual@blendlink.net (not support@blendlink.net)

wallet_page_founding_members.details: Wallet page shows founding members 50% off banner in membership section

wallet_page_strikethrough_prices.details: Wallet page membership tiers show strikethrough standard prices

wallet_page_bl_coins_packages.details: All 4 BL coin packages visible: Starter ($4.99/30K), Value ($9.99/80K), Pro ($14.99/400K), Premium ($29.99/1M)

bl_coins_quantity_bug.issue: BL Coins $29.99 Ultimate tier with quantity 2+ was failing 'Failed to process purchase'
bl_coins_quantity_bug.fix: Backend stripe_payments.py line 879 now calculates expected_price using quantity multiplier
bl_coins_quantity_bug.verification: API tests pass for quantity=2 ($59.98) and quantity=3 ($89.97)

stripe_onboarding_bug.issue: Stripe onboarding was failing 'Failed to start Stripe onboarding'
stripe_onboarding_bug.fix: Improved error handling in stripe_payments.py lines 1288-1301
stripe_onboarding_bug.verification: POST /api/payments/stripe/connect/onboard returns valid Stripe Connect URL

subscription_body_stream_bug.issue: Subscription checkout failing with 'body stream already read' error
subscription_body_stream_bug.fix: Both Wallet.jsx (lines 463-476) and SubscriptionTiers.jsx (lines 179-186) now use text-first pattern: responseText = await response.text() then JSON.parse()
subscription_body_stream_bug.verification: All subscription checkout endpoints return checkout_url successfully

founding_members_text.text: Founding members who join during the pre-launch/launch period will have their subscription rate locked at 50% off the standard price...

success_rate.backend: 91.7% (11/12 tests passed - 1 test script issue, not API bug)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 161 bugs verified fixed: BL coins quantity>1 for Ultimate tier works, Stripe Connect onboarding works, subscription checkout returns checkout_url for all tiers, founding members 50% off text visible on both pages, strikethrough standard prices shown, support email changed to virtual@blendlink.net. Backend uses text-first pattern for response parsing to avoid body stream errors.
